problem id: 18c797f1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01001000 -> 10100100
  00011100 -> 11001110
  01001001 -> 10110100
  00011111 -> 11111111
  01000100 -> 01100010
  01010110 -> 01001011
  11000101 -> 00110010
  10010101 -> 00011010
  00000100 -> 01000010

query: 00101111
predicted answer: 11100111
